title: The Big Boss
actors: Kôji Tsuruta, Akira Takarada, Yumi Shirakawa
plot: Ryuta and Mineo Komatsu are brothers, both yakuza (gangsters). Mineo, although complicit in crime, even murder, wants out of the gangster life, hoping to become a successful singer instead. Ryuta loves his brother, but Mineo's pos...
